sessionName: Threshold 3×8 min @ T + MHR retest (run only)
intro: Threshold + MHR test (Tue↔Wed swap, Adj #46 — Hyp A done Tue, no lift today).

flags: Hold 8:00/mi; go by RPE 7, ignore HR (reads high — Adj #9).
MHR test = one continuous 2–3 min effort; final 30–60 s all-out is the END of that block, not extra. Peak HR is a floor; ≥195–205 → recompute zones.
cardio.workout: Warmup 1.0–1.5 mi easy → build to T. | 3×8 min @ T, 90 s jog rec. | 3–5 min easy jog. | MHR test 2–3 min: ramp pace/grade, final 30–60 s flat-out (within the 2–3), note peak HR. | Cooldown 1.0 mi easy.
cardio.warmup: 1.0–1.5 mi easy, build to T pace.
cardio.cooldown: 1.0 mi easy + SI prehab (Tyler 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1).
cues: Hold 8:00 — don't bank time early on the 8 min reps.
Save enough for the MHR test to hit a true max.
